description:
The position was slightly different that evening, but I donÂ´t recall it. It should be equivalent.
Anyway black is a 1kyu player and thought he could cut. Can he really?
I messed the problem when I first uploaded it. Sorry for the few having tried it.
I hope it is correct now.

(;W[mg];B[nf];W[mf];B[ne];W[md]C[White captures blacks cutting stones. That is alright, but blacks stones have one more liberty and one more peep (at A and B) than in the correct solution.
When you capture cutting stones, you want to capture them as tightly as possible. So unless N13 is an important tesuji for some other problem on the board (well not here obviously) it is inferiour.]
